chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No.S-91 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.09.2025 Miss Ghulam Khadeeja Bhatti, advocate a/w petitioners. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Asstt. A. G. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G assisted by Mr. Zain-ul- Abideen Abbasi, A.P.G. ASI Aijaz Ali Thebo of behalf of SSP Shikarpur and Inspector Imran Ali of PS Al-Falah District Korangi are present. -.-.-.-.-.- Report/comments are filed on behalf of official respondents No.1 to 3, taken on record. Respondent No.5 Haq Nazar is present and submits that the petitioner No.1 (Anar Gul) is her real sister, who contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 (Irfan Ali) by exercising her right of freewill and he while showing his generosity submits that neither they have caused any sort of harassment nor they intend to do so in future. In view of above, learned Counsel for the petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of the petition with direction to the official respondents to provide protection toe the petitioners in accordance with law. Learned Asstt. A. G has no objection Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of in the terms stated above. Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
